name: Bang Pu industrial connector
notes: Industrial estate, truck-served roads, and worker commute pattern make this a strong fast-charge and fleet-support corridor candidate.

name: Bang Pu coastal destination and civic fringe
notes: Coastal leisure edge with Bang Pu Recreation Center plus municipal support nearby; suitable for destination charging but not isolated seafront buildout.

name: Praksa-Bang Pu housing and service expansion
notes: Residential growth and service-retail expansion between Praksa, Bang Pu municipality, and the Sukhumvit corridor.
